meaning: n.[植]多花紫树,蓝果树,紫树木材
examples: Elvis Aaron Presley was born in the southern town of Tupelo, Mississippi on January 8th, 1935.
Strong winds toppling some homes, all an apparent tornado damaged a shopping mall in Tupelo, Mississippi.
Growing up in a poor and religious home in Tupelo, Mississippi, he taught himself how to play the guitar.
Early on, Comcast was upgrading its Tupelo, Mississippi, network from three to five channels.
Investigators, some in hazardous materials suits, searched Mr Dutschke's home, business and vehicles in Tupelo.
